title: Ceramic 38.5 CM Casserole Baking Dish with Handles, (1.6 L) Oval Gold Au Gratin Dishes, Lasagna Pan Bakeware, Food Preserve Tray, Catering Casserole Dish for Party Style
features: Elegant And Stylish Design - This Baking Dish leads the dining trend with its expressive colors and finishes. With its vibrant color palette and captivating finishes, it creates an alluring ambiance that exudes warmth. The eye-catching reactive glazes and rich, vivid hues not only soothe the senses but also elevate your dining experience. to produce at high temperature, finally maybe will have 3-4 colors which is different.

Generous Capacity & Deep Design - Measuring Oval 31.5 CM x 21.5 CM x 6 CM with a 1600ML capacity, with Handles 38.5 CM, this casserole dish is perfect for cooking large portions. The deep design allows you to bake layered dishes or hearty meals with ease.

High-Quality Ceramic - Made from premium ceramic, this baking dish ensures even heat distribution, resulting in perfectly cooked dishes every time, while its durable construction resists chipping and cracking.Safe for use in the dishwasher, microwave, refrigerator, and oven, and can withstand temperatures up to 500°F/260°C.

Versatile and Practical Design - The deep design and large capacity make this oven dish ideal for baking, roasting, and serving, catering to both everyday meals and special occasions. The sturdy handles on both sides provide a secure and comfortable grip, ensuring easy transport from oven to table, even with oven mitts.
Perfect Gift - With its elegant design and practical functionality, this lasagne dish makes an excellent gift for housewarmings, weddings, or anyone who loves to cook.
